title: Fourth Impact occurred in 2 And more things you missed
display_title: Fourth Impact occurred in 2 And more things you missed
wikitext:
[]: Fourth Impact occurred in 2 - And more things you missed.             Quote Post by unitM » Thu Feb 06, 2014 1:00 pm Shinji grabs and (meta)physically removes Rei inside 01. Outside of 01, we're following this: An impact has begun. No, continued: (This, in itself, is an interesting point that I have not considered until now: What if all the impacts are essentially continuations of another one? Note the commentary in the above picture...) A few minutes after the Door of Guf is opened(first image) and Shinji does his thing with Rei, there's a clip of this: Umm, wait a second: didn't Shinji just start an impact completely elsewhere? (look at the first image) And so, fourth impact actually occurred in 2. There were two impacts: one that Shinji is clearly seen as responsible for(top image), the second occurring above another site altogether. There's more though. A reminder that this is where the Black Moon is buried in 3. Shinji opens an impact in 3 in this exact spot. Which leads us to wonder... was someone trying to dig up the Black Moon right now? No, SEELE will not remain quiet about this, Kaji. It's interesting to note, though, that the Door of Guf rings in 3.0 are not simply red and white. They are multicoloured. These ones are red. Shinji opens the Door of Guf in the same spot too, albeit with an ADAM... perhaps Unit 01's activation and the double impact is an important ritual for everything that led up to what we saw in 3. We aren't done though. It gets weird here. Mountain Rubble Anyone else find it odd how the four columns(see above picture of the first two) are solid objects in 3? And yet, here, they're being sucked into Door of Guf. Sure, there is a possibility that they all landed in a way that bricked the mountain back together... but really, what are the odds? Look carefully at the second picture - the mountain is destroyed to the point of being see through in a number of places. Preview of 3, from 2, for comparison on the mountain. Could it be connected to this scene? The other weird point is this: Notice that there is only one Door of Guf open here. There are also the white mountain cracks. Yet there was an amount of time that elapsed before we were shown a clip of a second Door of Guf opening, so it simply could not have been one door. It would make no sense to show Shinji opening one door upon rescuing Rei, have the scene skip to people chatting with each other, and then a few minutes later, reshow the same door opening, with Shinji nowhere to be seen. There must have been two doors. No mountains. Still no mountains. Nope. (Notice 5 pillars, 4 Reis, 9 coffins on the moon?) Yet Kaworu fired off the spear at one of the doors to spearhead Shinji. Strangely enough, this door was open where the mountain was shattered into 4... which was where Shinji was not. Remember guys, Shinji was a glowing giant. If we wanted to see him here, there would be no overlooking him. Bonus points: Things we may have overlooked Self-explantory Super-human Shinji. Remember Asuka cracking the glass when she aimed a punch at Shinji? Well this is Shinji physically ripping the machinery of the entry plug right before launching for Rei. In this same movie, when the Dummy Plug system was activated, Shinji couldn't even escape the machinery when it was placed over his hands and in front of his face. Same eyes as 3's Adam, though less beady. The right side of "core Rei" has the same water waves we saw in EoE(look above the glowing light and to the right of Rei's head - it's when 01 is hugging her) Evidently, Kaworu is not the only one in on what's happening with 01's awakening. This might be a public NERV thing. This next part is pretty neat. Coffin, lying amongst 7 pillars in a lake of LCL. Kaworu, wet hair. Kaworu from previous scene, still standing amongst a red background(relevant to coffin?) with 4 Rei shadows.

[]:             Quote Post by Charsi » Thu Feb 06, 2014 1:39 pm Well there's the whole fact that Shinji busts through the wall of the command center, punches Zeruel in the face, then scrapes his face against the rail while riding up to the surface of the GeoFront . At no time does Shinji return to ground level proper. The end of 2.22 from Shinji's perspective takes place in the GeoFront. Someone explained in another thread - when I asked this exact same thing - that the cross shaped crack is actually a crack in the surface, caused by the impact event emanating from below the surface. The rings above surface level are kind of like a "copy" of the rings below ground, like there's an impact happening in the GeoFront with a giant of light and wings and stuff, and a mirror impact happening above-ground with none of those things. It didn't sit well with me. But then we see Kaworu toss the spear (he must have threaded the needle to hit Shinji through the crack in the earth). Mark.06 then hangs above the speared Eva-01 and we can clearly see the moon hanging in the night sky behind him . Except, we KNOW Eva-01 is pinned to the GeoFront. Wait, why can we see the moon underground? At some point, the entire lid of the GeoFront got blown off! The only explanation (to me) is that there's a few minutes between Ritsuko's final line ("this is the end of the world") and Kaworu throwing the spear. In that timeframe, the impact continues, excavating the dome of earth that conceals the GeoFront, which incidentally produces the giant "crater" seen in 3.33 (but doesn't explain why there's a pyramid floating in the air, giant red crosses to the horizon, tooth canyon, etc).

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Thu Feb 06, 2014 2:01 pm Charsi wrote: Well there's the whole fact that Shinji busts through the wall of the command center, punches Zeruel in the face, then scrapes his face against the rail while riding up to the surface of the GeoFront . At no time does Shinji return to ground level proper. The end of 2.22 from Shinji's perspective takes place in the GeoFront. Someone explained in another thread - when I asked this exact same thing - that the cross shaped crack is actually a crack in the surface, caused by the impact event emanating from below the surface.

[]: Re: Fourth Impact occurred in 2 - And more things you missed             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Feb 06, 2014 2:05 pm This is pretty rambly. The way the movie is structured there is no big multi-impact consipracy implied. It's very straight-forward. What we see at the end of 2.0 is N3I being started in the geofront which is eventually ripped open and the Door of Guf acsends into the now open sky and then Eva-01 just gets speared. To Be Continued in 3 years. unitM wrote: This next part is pretty neat.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Thu Feb 06, 2014 2:15 pm Firstly: Just because it's not implied, doesn't mean it's not there. Just because the movie doesn't purposely draw attention to a certain thing, doesn't mean that there isn't anything going on. Secondly: The ascension of the Door of Guf was something I thought of two. But that can't be right, because the Door does not simply surface out of the ground. The Door opens above ground without ascending. It does not levitate upwards. It opens from thin air, and then shatters the earth. The earth does not shatter and give way to the door. Perhaps, yes, Kaworu chucks a spear through this door, through the mountains, into Shinji. But that is independent from the fact that a second door(or, following your reasoning, the first door) suddenly opens above the surface and then cracks the earth.

[]: Re: Fourth Impact occurred in 2 - And more things you missed             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Feb 06, 2014 2:34 pm The Door opening above EVA-01 was probably just the "charging" of the Impact, then after some charging time the true bigass door of guf opens above Tokyo-3, gutting open the Geofront. I'm not even sure that the "little door" just above EVA-01 is still here when the big one opens. Also Door of Guf =/= Impact, Second Impact was stopped 15 years before the beginning of the movie, yet its Door of Guf was still opened, it's the interaction between an Awakened Evangelion or a SoL and a Door of Guf that makes the Impact, illustrated by the wings of light connecting the Evangelion/SoL to the Door. unitM wrote: Nope. (Notice 5 pillars, 4 Reis, 9 coffins on the moon?)

[]: Re: Fourth Impact occurred in 2 - And more things you missed             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Feb 06, 2014 3:07 pm unitM wrote: An impact has begun. No, continued: (This, in itself, is an interesting point that I have not considered until now: What if all the impacts are essentially continuations of another one? Note the commentary in the above picture...)

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Thu Feb 06, 2014 3:30 pm @FriskyIan Blah blah blah bad subs, your loss dude. That was a speck of a detail that isn't even remotely a factor of the rest of the theory. It's just something I wanted to point out off to the side. I understand what everyone here is pointing out to me, but no one is really supplying anything substantial to outright tell me I'm wrong. All I'm hearing is "it probably wasn't that." If that's the case, I'll just reverse that: it probably is something. Here's a bunch of images to accompany what I think might be happening.There is nothing that says a Door of Guf can only be opened one at a time. In fact, I think I remember 2 Doors being opened in EoE, albeit in a much different shape, and not in the sky but on GNR's palms. I've also explained why I think there were 2 Impacts and not just 2 Doors(scroll up, it was one of my first replies). Though I think I have learned some things here, like the distance between the mountains(; I don't think the "lid was blown off" but maybe that I undervalued the distance between the four mountain heads a little. Maybe it's irrelevant. That's fine if you feel that way. This thread is just an observation of mine, in which a known event in the Evangelion universe is acting unusually and I consider the event important enough to warrant a thread. But to be honest, the more I do think about it, the less attention was drawn to it, and the more characters speak about it like... they don't. By the way, is there anything on wet Kaworu as pointed out?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Feb 06, 2014 3:53 pm unitM wrote: Firstly: Just because it's not implied, doesn't mean it's not there. Just because the movie doesn't purposely draw attention to a certain thing, doesn't mean that there isn't anything going on.

[]:             Quote Post by Charsi » Thu Feb 06, 2014 4:13 pm And that's pretty much exactly what was explained to me (though apparently I was confused about the rings). What it doesn't explain is the giant red crosses, giant red core eva-01 shaped humanoids, teeth canyon, moon blood grid, etc. But that's got very little to do with the premise of this thread. The impact originated in, and blew the lid off, the geofront. In fact, TMB's post is the first that i've seen that has that layered diagram (apologies if I somehow missed it) that absolutely cements that they knew they were drawing a geofront with the roof forcibly removed.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Feb 06, 2014 4:37 pm Charsi wrote: What it doesn't explain is the giant red crosses, giant red core eva-01 shaped humanoids, teeth canyon, moon blood grid, etc. But that's got very little to do with the premise of this thread. The impact originated in, and blew the lid off, the geofront.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Thu Feb 06, 2014 4:50 pm TMBounty_Hunter Thank you for those animations. I have not seen those before. Especially thank you for changing the speed on that one animation of Guf rising to an exaggeratedly slow speed... dick. At least this was a lot more conclusive than I thought.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Feb 06, 2014 5:17 pm unitM wrote: dick

[]: Re: Fourth Impact occurred in 2 - And more things you missed             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Feb 09, 2014 10:40 pm I don't necessarily agree with this idea, but just to comment on translation stuff: TheFriskyIan wrote: This is where I stopped reading. I take whatever Fan Subs give me with a grain of salt simply because I have no idea whether or not they're giving me a slightly inaccurate translation that just fits whatever narrative they want happening on screen.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Feb 10, 2014 3:43 am In the light of 3.0, notably how Asuka was saying to Mari that they'll stop Third Impact for starting all over again even though everyone(both WILLE and Kaworu) refers to the event as Fourth Impact, I think that by "The continuation of Second Impact..." Ritsuko meant that it'll continue the purpose of Second Impact, meaning the extermination of human life, instead of "reactivating" the Second Impact. Well that's my two cents.

[]:             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Sun Feb 16, 2014 4:05 am ElMariachi wrote: In the light of 3.0, notably how Asuka was saying to Mari that they'll stop Third Impact for starting all over again even though everyone(both WILLE and Kaworu) refers to the event as Fourth Impact, I think that by "The continuation of Second Impact..."

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Feb 16, 2014 6:17 am ^ It's before they realize that EVA-13 is a surviving ADAM, but I don't see your point : so far an Impact exterminates the human race, Third Impact was obviously completely stopped a while ago, since there isn't any vortex above Tokyo-3, so any "restart" or "continuation" of the Impact simply means that it'll pick off the work left by the previous one : finish the extermination of the Lilin that its predecessor couldn't achieve.
